creator: gb.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
System is an IBM Thinkpad T41 laptop.  

When booting with ACPI enabled using GENERIC or custom kernel, the system will freeze just after enabling the acpi_acad0 device if either a 3Com Megahertz 3CCFEM556B (ep0) or Xircom CreditCard 10/100 (xe0) PC-Card NIC is inserted at cold boot into either Cardbus slot.  With ACPI disabled, the system will boot to a login prompt, but will freeze shortly after.  There is no panic and no core dump, just a lockup.

Without either card inserted, the system will boot fine.  The system will also boot fine with an Atheros 5212 Cardbus (ath0) wireless NIC inserted at cold boot.  

If either the 3Com or Xirom cards are inserted after the boot process is complete, the kernel will output the warning "interrupt storm detected on "irq11:"; throttling interrupt source", but otherwise appears to work.

Note that the same system occasionally used to panic (about once every 2-3 months) when running FreeBSD 7.2, often after a similar interrupt storm warning.  However, the freeze on boot with PC-Card NIC installed is new to 8.0.

Also note that the system's ACPI firmware is buggy.  IASL reports the following errors on the output from acpidump (which I posted at http://rapidshare.com/files/311909934/ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl.tgz.html):

t41# iasl ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl

Intel ACPI Component Architecture
ASL Optimizing Compiler version 20090521
Copyright (C) 2000 - 2009 Intel Corporation
Supports ACPI Specification Revision 3.0a

ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl  5147:                         Method (MHQC, 1, NotSerialized)
Warning  1087 -                Not all control paths return a value ^  (MHQC)

ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl  5180:                         Method (MHGC, 0, NotSerialized)
Warning  1087 -                Not all control paths return a value ^  (MHGC)

ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl  9330:                 Field (U7CS, DWordAcc, NoLock, Preserve)
Error    4027 -   Access width is greater than region size ^

ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl  9332:                     PWKI,   1,
Error    4028 -                                         ^ Access width of Field Unit extends beyond region limit

ibm_thinkpad_t41_acpi.asl  9333:                     PWUC,   6,
Error    4028 -                                         ^ Access width of Field Unit extends beyond region limit

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: Boot system with PC-Card devices installed.
